arts.ttl: Who will replace Harry Kane at Bayern Munich?
arts.sum: According to Sky Germany, Bayern Munich believe they have a plethora of options when it comes to replacing Harry Kane over the next few weeks. As previously reported, the England…

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso knows DFB-Pokal match vs. Bayern Munich will be special
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen boss Xabi Alonso can look back to his squad’s 1-1 draw with Bayern Munich on September 28th to see an effective way to keep the potent Bavarian attack at bay. Playing in Munich is probably the biggest challenge you can have in the DFB-Pokal and is a top game for everyone.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso on Bayer Leverkusen’s DFB Pokal tie against Bayern Munich: “The match is like a final.”
arts.sum: Speaking at his pre-match press conference, Xabi Alonso spoke on Bayer Leverkusen’s tie against Bayern Munich in the DFB Pokal round of 16. On the game at the Allianz Arena,…

arts.ttl: Kerim Alajbegovic: Bosnia's biggest talent is looking to break through at Leverkusen
arts.sum: The injury crisis at Bayer Leverkusen could open the door for a young, up-and-coming talent from the academy to make the jump to the first team. Kerim Alajbegovic has impressed playing for the...

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany ready for second chance at Bayer Leverkusen this season in DFB-Pokal showdown
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany remembers his team’s 1-1 draw with Bayer Leverkusen well. The manager is hoping for a different result (and a chance to advance in the DFB-Pokal), but is also unsure on how Bayer Leverkusen will approach the match.
The 26-player shortlist for the 2024 Men's FIFPRO World XI has been announced after tallying votes from 28,000 footballers.

arts.ttl: Don't panic about Barcelona or Bayern Munich yet, more
arts.sum: We had another shocking Barcelona defeat in LaLiga as Real Madrid close the gap at the top, we got Arne Slot's Liverpool cruising past Pep Guardiola and Manchester City in the Premier League's big game, and we saw Harry Kane hobble off hurt as Bayern Munich drew with Borussia Dortmund in Der Klassiker . We also saw more chaos for RB Leipzig, a dominant win by Chelsea (over Aston Villa ) and Arsenal (over West Ham), late drama for Juventus and former Man United midfielder Scott McTominay looking the part in Napoli's latest 1-0 victory to keep them top of Serie A .

arts.ttl: How Bayer Leverkusen’s Florian Wirtz has lit up world football
arts.sum: His father Hans is still the chairman, a referee and youth coach at the football club in the village, Grün-Weiß Brauweiler, and always took Florian and his sister Juliane to the pitch, where they played for whole afternoons. Benedikt Hammans, who coached Florian in the children's teams at Cologne for three years, knows one way to describe his parents: “The Wirtz’s were an outdoor family.”

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich won’t exercise buyback option on PSV Eindhoven’s Malik Tillman
arts.sum: Bayern are not planning to bring Malik Tillman back even though they have a buy-back clause for the player. According to a report from Sky Sport journalist Kerry Hau (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Bayern Munich has no current plans to bring back Malik Tillman, even though the club has a buyback option on the youngster.

arts.ttl: England boss Lee Carsley has nothing but good things to say about Harry Kane
arts.sum: Former Bayern Munich head coach Thomas Tuchel is about to be re-united with star striker Harry Kane in his new post in charge of the England men’s national team. But in the meantime, interim England boss Lee Carsley has found a working rapport with Kane — and left a positive impact of his own.
